---
name: Peer page
about: Add a dedicated peer profile page with identity, offerings, services, and reputation
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
Add a dedicated **Peer page** so users can evaluate a peer before routing requests.

## What it should show
- Who the peer is
- What they offer
- Website or external link, if provided
- Services they offer on the network
- Reputation and other relevant trust/performance signals

## Why
This would improve peer discovery, transparency, and trust when choosing providers on the AntSeed network.

## Suggested fields
- Display name
- Short bio / description
- Website / GitHub / docs link
- Network services offered
- Categories / capabilities / models
- Reputation score
- Reliability / success rate / uptime / latency
- Completed requests / activity history
- Verification or badge status, if applicable

## Acceptance criteria
- A user can open a dedicated page for any peer
- The page clearly shows identity, offerings, links, services, and reputation data
- The page is accessible from peer listings/search results
